page_content:
Prerequisite: BMGT221.

BMGT326 Accounting Systems (3 Credits)

A study of accounting systems and computer and communications technology.

Prerequisite: BMGT221; and (BMGT201 or BMGT301).

BMGT332 Quantitative Models for Management Decisions (3 Credits) The aim of this course is to introduce management science techniques for informed decision-making that can be applied in spreadsheet

models to assist in the decision-analysis process. Models include Linear Programming, Transportation and Assignment problems, network flow models, Integer and non-linear programming, Simulation and Decision Trees.

Prerequisite: BMGT231 or BMGT230; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
